zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强，短线蓄势上攻
zh.content:
ETH/USD当前围绕1757附近窄幅波动，24小时变化几乎为零，显示多空力量暂时均衡。价格仍稳于SMA(20)之上，说明短线结构尚未转弱，整体更偏向高位整理，等待方向选择。

MACD主线为10.88742，维持在零轴上方，说明中期动能仍偏多。虽然RSI(14)缺失，无法精确判断超买状态，但从价格贴近日内高点来看，市场仍有继续上探的意愿，若放量则更利于突破。

下方支撑先看1751附近的20日均线，其次是1740一带的心理关口；若失守，短线回调风险会明显增加。上方阻力先看1757.4附近的日内高点，进一步目标在1765与1780区域，突破后才有延续空间。

操作上，激进者可在1751上方分批试多，止损放在1740下方；稳健者宜等待有效突破1760后再跟进。若价格回落并跌破SMA(20)，应及时减仓观望，避免在震荡末端追高。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading in a very tight intraday range around 1,757, with the 24-hour change essentially flat. That price behavior suggests short-term consolidation rather than a decisive breakout or breakdown. The market is pausing after recent movement, and direction will likely depend on whether buyers can keep price above the nearby moving average support. For now, ETH/USD looks neutral to mildly constructive as long as it holds this base.

The SMA(20) at 1,751.62 sits just below spot price, which is a modestly bullish sign because price remains above the short-term average. MACD at 10.88742 is positive, indicating underlying momentum is still favorable, but the missing signal line limits confirmation of trend strength or crossover status. RSI is unavailable, so overbought or oversold conditions cannot be judged directly, making price action and key levels more important for confirmation.

Immediate support is near 1,756, based on the session low, followed by the stronger short-term support at 1,751.6 from the 20-day SMA. If that level fails, downside pressure could accelerate toward the next psychological zone around 1,740 and then 1,720. On the upside, 1,757 to 1,760 is the first resistance band. A clean push above that area could open the door toward 1,775 and then 1,800 if momentum improves.

For traders, this is a market where patience matters more than chasing small moves. Range traders may look to buy dips near 1,752 to 1,756 with tight risk controls below the SMA, while breakout traders may wait for a convincing close above 1,760 before entering. Until volume expands, ETH/USD likely remains in a compressed consolidation phase, so disciplined position sizing and clear stops are essential.
